debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ map (fun ω => u \ X ω) P = @ProbabilityTheory.bernoulliOn ι u (unitInterval.symm p)

proof:
by
    have hsdiff : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) => u \ s) :=
      measurable_set_iff.mpr fun a => measurable_const.and (measurable_pi_apply a |>.not)
    have hsetOf : Measurable (fun (f : ι → Prop) => {i | f i}) := MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable
    have hfpi : Measurable (fun (f : ι → Prop) (i : ι) => i ∈ u ∧ ¬f i) :=
      measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i => measurable_const.and (measurable_pi_apply i |>.not)
    rw [show (fun ω => u \ X ω) = (fun s => u \ s) ∘ X from rfl,
        ← AEMeasurable.map_map_of_aemeasurable hsdiff.aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable, hX.map_eq,
        bernoulliOn_eq_map u p, bernoulliOn_eq_map u (σ p), map_map hsdiff hsetOf]
    conv_lhs => rw [show (fun (s : Set ι) => u \ s) ∘ (fun (f : ι → Prop) => {i | f i})
          = (fun (f : ι → Prop) => {i | f i}) ∘ (fun (f : ι → Prop) (i : ι) => i ∈ u ∧ ¬f i)
          from by ext f i; simp [Set.mem_diff]]
    rw [← map_map hsetOf hfpi, @infinitePi_map_pi ι (fun _ => Prop) _
          (fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) _
          (fun _ => Prop) _ (fun (i : ι) (b : Prop) => i ∈ u ∧ ¬b)
          (fun i => measurable_of_finite _)]
    suffices h : (fun i ↦ Measure.map (fun b ↦ i ∈ u ∧ ¬b)
        (toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)) =
      (fun i ↦ toNNReal (σ p) • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ (σ p)) • dirac False) by
      rw [h]
    ext i : 1
    simp only [symm_symm]
    by_cases hi : i ∈ u
    · simp only [eq_true hi, true_and]
      have hm : Measurable (Not : Prop → Prop) := measurable_of_finite _
      ext s hs
      rw [map_apply hm hs]; simp only [smul_apply, add_apply]
      have h1 : (dirac True : Measure Prop) (Not ⁻¹' s) = (dirac False : Measure Prop) s := by
        simp only [dirac_apply' _ hs, dirac_apply' _ (hm hs), Set.indicator]
        congr 1; change (Not True ∈ s) = (False ∈ s); simp
      have h2 : (dirac False : Measure Prop) (Not ⁻¹' s) = (dirac True : Measure Prop) s := by
        simp only [dirac_apply' _ hs, dirac_apply' _ (hm hs), Set.indicator]
        congr 1; change (Not False ∈ s) = (True ∈ s); simp
      rw [h1, h2]; ring
    · simp only [eq_false hi, false_and]
      rw [Measure.map_const, measure_univ, one_smul, ← add_smul,
          show (toNNReal (σ p) + toNNReal p : NNReal) = 1 from by
            rw [add_comm]; exact toNNReal_add_toNNReal_symm p,
          one_smul]
successful_attempts:
by
    have hsdiff : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) => u \ s) :=
      measurable_set_iff.mpr fun a => measurable_const.and (measurable_pi_apply a |>.not)

    conv_lhs => rw [show (fun (s : Set ι) => u \ s) ∘ (fun (f : ι → Prop) => {i | f i})

      ext s hs

      have h1 : (dirac True : Measure Prop) (Not ⁻¹' s) = (dirac False : Measure Prop) s := by

      have h2 : (dirac False : Measure Prop) (Not ⁻¹' s) = (dirac True : Measure Prop) s := by

    · simp only [eq_false hi, false_and]
